action_set_definitions.name: get_factory_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current global factory state including simulation time and cumulative energy usage.

action_set_definitions.name: get_machine_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the operational requirements and current status for a specific machine ID.

action_set_definitions.name: get_tooling_status
action_set_definitions.description: Locates a specific piece of hardware/tooling and identifies if it is currently in use or in storage.

action_set_definitions.name: get_staff_roster
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full internal workforce database including skill sets, labor law metrics, and certification dates.

action_set_definitions.name: transfer_hardware
action_set_definitions.description: Moves required tooling from its current location to the target workstation.

action_set_definitions.name: start_production_run
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates the production task on a machine with the assigned crew.

action_set_definitions.name: move_to_buffer
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the completed batch to the production buffer.

action_set_definitions.name: abort_with_reason
action_set_definitions.description: Terminates the plan and provides a detailed analytical report of the constraints that prevented execution.

error_summary.description: A detailed breakdown of which staff failed which specific constraints (rest period, cert, skill, weekly hours).

state_description.current_time: The current simulation clock in minutes from the start of the shift.
state_description.machines: A map of machine IDs to their current status (idle, busy, maintenance, broken) and time remaining for current task.
state_description.inventory: Current stock levels for raw materials and components.
state_description.production_buffer: Items currently waiting between stages or finished goods ready for shipment.
state_description.pending_orders: List of orders that need to be scheduled and completed.
state_description.energy_usage_total: Cumulative energy consumption of the factory in kWh.
